message:
✨ Enable clipboard cut/copy/paste in web terminal (#131)

Add attachCustomKeyEventHandler to xterm instances to support:
- Ctrl/Cmd+V: paste from system clipboard into terminal
- Ctrl/Cmd+C: copy selected text to clipboard (passes through to terminal when no selection)
- Ctrl/Cmd+X: copy selected text to clipboard

Works on both Mac (Cmd) and non-Mac (Ctrl) platforms.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
